scripts.dev: bun run --filter=@affine/web dev & bun run --filter=@affine/api dev
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter=@affine/web typecheck && bun run --filter=@affine/api typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --filter=@affine/web lint && bun run --filter=@affine/api lint
scripts.format: bun run --filter=@affine/web format && bun run --filter=@affine/api format
scripts.test: bun run --filter=@affine/web test && bun run --filter=@affine/api test
